title: Kenui's Extra Dimensions
description: Explore a myriad of dimensions, surrounded by diverse creatures, items, ores, blocks, and even machines!
body:
## Enhance your vanilla experience with some Extra Dimensions!
Explore a myriad of dimensions, surrounded by diverse creatures, items, ores, blocks, and even machines!

### Check out our new mod: The Underworld! The new separate mod from the Extra Dimensions Series, now in the latest versions! Download now: https://modrinth.com/mod/the_underworld



## Dimensions in this mod:

- The Underworld
  
- Dark Continent

- The Start

- Overworld: Reimagined

- Volcano

- Wisteria

- Living Corpse (Flesh Dimension)

- Aquarius

- Emerald Dimension

- Iron Dimension

- Gold Dimension

- Wood Dimension

- Quartz Dimension

- Obsidian Dimension

(The portals of this mod have the same frame structure than Nether Portal and their blocks are in the "Extra Dimensions Guide" item.)
